content:
# 84.51 Degrees Software Engineer – Co-op Program Interview Preparation

Prepare for your 84.51 Degrees Software Engineer – Co-op Program internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Cincinnati, OH
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from 84.51 Degrees
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

84.51 Degrees is offering a Software Engineer – Co-op Program internship position in Cincinnati, OH. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research 84.51 Degrees's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your 84.51 Degrees interview and increase your chances of success.
